notes: Chunk contains a single event: part 1 of 2 of the Q1 FY2024 earnings call transcript (CAKE_2024-05-08T17.00); part 2 is handled by another bot.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (fiscal_kpis appear only on chunk_001).
Skipped eps_surprise: no reported-vs-consensus EPS comparison in visible text (only year-over-year growth and better-than-projected profitability, captured as net_income_margin_surprise).
Skipped natural_gas_price: mention too thin ('natural gas obviously'); folded into utility_costs.
Skipped to_go_supply_costs and wage_management: minor components already covered by utility_costs / labor_productivity evidence.
Skipped kitchen_display_system and loyalty platform replacement: single-instance initiatives, folded into supply_chain_efficiency narrative.
Skipped Fortune 100 Best Companies award: sentiment/recognition, not a reusable causal variable.
Skipped North Italia lunch/dinner day-part mix and regional geographic differences: described as steady/no difference, no causal claim.
Skipped liquidity and total debt levels: balance-sheet status with no causal claim attached.
Skipped acquisition_related_expenses and lease_termination_costs as separate drivers: minor components grouped with asset_impairment evidence.
